detail.comment: Continuous screen-coverage detail. An entity's detail level L in [0,1] comes from its projected screen radius at the reference viewport height: L=0 at/below screenRadiusPx.glyph (the entity is the flat point-sprite proxy), L=1 at/above screenRadiusPx.full. Between the ends, discrete RUNGS (far/mid/close, min L per rung in rungMinLevel) pick the geometry segment tier and which named features are built. Features snap to rung boundaries on purpose: one hysteresis (hysteresisLevel, in L units) covers every transition, and a whole zoom sweep costs at most three mesh transitions per entity. rebuildBudgetPerFrame caps how many meshes may rebuild per frame during camera sweeps; entities over budget keep their previous rung until a later frame. The BAR-style icon cross-fade is fully derived, not authored: the proxy glyph is drawn ON TOP of the still-fully-opaque model, alpha ramping linearly from 0 at the close->mid rung boundary radius (glyph + rungMinLevel.close * (full - glyph) — the moment geometry drops to the MID tier) to 1 at/below the glyph radius, where the FAR model stops drawing entirely and the opaque glyph replaces it.

plasmaRungMinLevel.comment: Plasma-only visual rungs. Lower values keep the richer projectile mesh visible farther from the camera. HIGH now extends modestly beyond the general close rung; MEDIUM extends roughly twice as far before falling to the four-triangle LOW mesh.

plasmaSizeScaling.comment: Constant-angular-size LOD law. The smallest authored plasma (radius 2 * tail multiplier 24) has a 48-world-unit tail and keeps the existing thresholds. Larger plasma transition distances scale linearly by actualTailLength/referenceTailLengthWorld.

featureMinRung.comment: Rung at/above which each named feature is built: far=1, mid=2, close=3. 'far' features survive until the glyph flip; 'close' features shed first when zooming out.

animation.comment: Live per-frame animation shedding (no mesh rebuild). Below unitAnimationMinRung, barrel spin freezes and locomotion rigs (tread scroll, wheel spin, leg gait, floor clamps) update every locomotionFarFrameStride frames with accumulated dt instead of every frame. Building animators (wind/extractor/radar/solar) freeze below buildingAnimationMinRung.

effectSpawnScale.comment: Continuous spawn-count scaling by L: full at/above fullAbove, ramping down to the floor value at/below zeroBelow.

environment.comment: Environment props hide when their projected screen radius drops below these thresholds (px at the reference viewport height).
